Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWMENSALIDADES', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &hoje = serverdate() &padSerItmUltVct = YMDtoD(&hoje.Year(), &hoje.Month(), 1) loadwwpContext.Call(&wwpcontext) &EmpCod = &wwpcontext.EmpCod //btnMensalidadesGeradas.Visible = &wwpcontext.PesCod < 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &SerItmSts = nullvalue(&SerItmSts) &SerItmTip = TipoLancamentoServico.VENDA DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' CONTRATO/PREVISAO' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#WPGERARMENSALIDADES#', &wwpcontext.PesCod, &wwpcontext.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') &SdtServicosSelecionados.FromJson(&PadObs) DuplicatasSelect.Caption = format('%1 - selecionados', trim(str(&SdtServicosSelecionados.Count))) do 'Totaliza' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount SerItmUltVct.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' SerItmSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &DetailWebComponent = !'' &GridActionGroup1.Clear() &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO) &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(1, 'Inativar Contrato') Endif If (SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO) &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(2, 'Reativar Contrato') Endif &GridActionGroup1.AddItem(3, 'Visualizar Pedidos') SerItmUltVct.ColumnClass = iif(SerItmUltVct < &SerItmUltVct, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell', !'WWColumn') SerItmSts.ColumnClass = iif(SerItmSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do CAse Case SerItmSts = Status_ativoInativo.INATIVO or SerItmUltVct > &SerItmUltVct &ActionSelecione.Visible = 0 &IsSelecionado = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) // Case SerItmUltVct > &SerItmUltVct // &ActionSelecione.Enabled = 0 // &ActionSelecione.Visible = 1 // &IsSelecionado = false // &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) Case SerItmSts = Status_ativoInativo.ATIVO // &ActionSelecione.Enabled = 1 &ActionSelecione.Visible = 1 &IsSelecionado = false &AuxSerItmCod = SerItmCod do 'VerificaSelecionado' If &IsSelecionado = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) Endif EndCAse EndEvent Event &GridActionGroup1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &GridActionGroup1 = 1 Do 'Do InativarContrato' Case &GridActionGroup1 = 2 Do 'Do Reativar' Case &GridActionGroup1 = 3 Do 'Do VisualizarPedidos' EndCase &GridActionGroup1 = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event InativarContrato_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpInativarServicoVenda.Create(EmpCod, SerFilCod, SerItmCod, SerItmTip) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event InativarContrato_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInserirVendaContratual' wpVendaContratual.Link('INS', 0, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each Line if SerItmSts = Status_ativoInativo.ATIVO and SerItmUltVct < &SerItmUltVct &IsAchou = false For &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem in &SdtServicosSelecionados if &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmCod = SerItmCod //CASO TENHA DELETA &IsAchou = true EndIf EndFor if &IsAchou = false //ADD &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem = new() &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmCod = SerItmCod &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmVlr = SerItmVlr &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerCliRaz = SerCliRaz &SdtServicosSelecionados.Add(&SdtServicosSelecionadosItem) Endif Endif EndFor padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#WPGERARMENSALIDADES#', &wwpcontext.PesCod, &wwpcontext.EmpCod, &SdtServicosSelecionados.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoGerarMensalidades' if &SdtServicosSelecionados.Count > 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GerarMensalidades_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Não selecionado Nenhum cliente para geração de mensalidades!') Endif EndEvent Event GerarMensalidades_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpGerarMensalidades.Create() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GerarMensalidades_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMensalidadesGeradas' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wwMensalidadesGeradas.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wpItensServico.Create(EmpCod, SerItmCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InativarContrato' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ InativarContrato_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reativar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do VisualizarPedidos' wpPedidosGeradosMensal.Link(SerItmCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMSTS" &SerItmSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TIPOFILTRO" &TipoFiltro.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMULTVCT" &SerItmUltVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERCLICOD" &SerCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERCLICODRAZ" &SerCliCodRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"SERITMTIP" &SerItmTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &SerItmUltVct = &padSerItmUltVct EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMSTS", "", not &SerItmSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TIPOFILTRO", "", not &TipoFiltro.IsEmpty(), 0, &TipoFiltro, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMULTVCT", "", not &SerItmUltVct.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerItmUltVct.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERCLICOD", "", not &SerCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERCLICODRAZ", "", not &SerCliCodRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &SerCliCodRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"SERITMTIP", "", true, 0, &SerItmTip, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"ServicoCliente" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &UserUpdate.Click wpVendaContratual.Link('UPD', EmpCod, SerItmCod) EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click &AuxSerItmCod = SerItmCod do 'selecionaMensalidade' do 'totaliza' EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#WPGERARMENSALIDADES#', &wwpcontext.PesCod, &wwpcontext.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') &TotCreVlrSdo = 0 Refresh EndEvent Sub 'Totaliza' &TotCreVlrSdo = 0 For &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem in &SdtServicosSelecionados &TotCreVlrSdo += &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmVlr EndFor EndSub Sub 'VerificaSelecionado' For &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem in &SdtServicosSelecionados if &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmCod = &AuxSerItmCod &IsSelecionado = true Exit Endif EndFor EndSub Sub 'selecionaMensalidade' &IsAchou = false For &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem in &SdtServicosSelecionados if &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmCod = &AuxSerItmCod //CASO TENHA DELETA &IsAchou = true &Index = &SdtServicosSelecionados.IndexOf(&SdtServicosSelecionadosItem) &SdtServicosSelecionados.Remove(&Index) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) EndIf EndFor if &IsAchou = false //ADD &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem = new() &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmCod = &AuxSerItmCod &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerItmVlr = SerItmVlr &SdtServicosSelecionadosItem.SerCliRaz = SerCliRaz &SdtServicosSelecionados.Add(&SdtServicosSelecionadosItem) &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#WPGERARMENSALIDADES#', &wwpcontext.PesCod, &wwpcontext.EmpCod, &SdtServicosSelecionados.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') DuplicatasSelect.Caption = format('%1 - selecionados', trim(str(&SdtServicosSelecionados.Count))) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
